requirement_topic.en: Azerenerji / Azerishig Grid-Connection Requirements — 50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V CIS-Legacy Grid Parameters and Anti-Islanding (IEC 62116 / IEC 61727)
requirement_topic.zh: Azerenerji/Azerishig并网要求——50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V独联体传统电网参数及防孤岛（IEC 62116 / IEC 61727）
requirement_topic.zht: Azerenerji/Azerishig併網要求——50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V獨聯體傳統電網參數及防孤島（IEC 62116 / IEC 61727）

summary.en: Azerbaijan's electricity grid operates at 50 Hz with a CIS-legacy nominal voltage of 220 V single-phase and 380 V three-phase — the same nominal values as China's domestic grid under GB/T 156. Azerenerji is the state-owned generation and transmission company; Azerishig (AzərEnerji subsidiary / distribution arm) operates the distribution and retail network. Grid-connected PV inverters must comply with Azerbaijan's grid-connection technical requirements, which include: (1) IEC 62116 anti-islanding test compliance — inverters must detect loss-of-mains and disconnect within the required time; (2) IEC 61727 (Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface) for grid interface characteristics; (3) frequency and voltage protection thresholds set to Azerishig / Azerenerji network specifications; (4) power quality and harmonic limits per applicable AZS or IEC standards; (5) project-specific grid-connection approval from Azerenerji or Azerishig before energisation. Large-scale projects (e.g., Masdar Garadagh 230 MW, ACWA Power projects) follow IEC standards and lender specifications (EBRD, IFC) regardless of whether local minimums require them. IMPORTANT: The nominal CIS 220/380 V at 50 Hz grid means re-parameterisation risk versus Chinese factory firmware is low compared to markets with different nominal voltages, but Azerbaijan grid-operator approval and project-specific protection settings remain mandatory — China domestic grid-connection approval does not transfer.
summary.zh: 阿塞拜疆电网以50 Hz运行，独联体传统标称电压为单相220 V、三相380 V——与中国依据GB/T 156的国内电网标称值相同。Azerenerji为国有发电和输电公司；Azerishig（Azerenerji子公司/配电部门）运营配电和零售网络。并网光伏逆变器须符合阿塞拜疆并网技术要求，包括：（1）IEC 62116防孤岛测试合规——逆变器须在规定时间内检测电网失电并断开；（2）IEC 61727（光伏系统——公用电力接口特性）对电网接口特性的规定；（3）频率和电压保护阈值须按Azerishig/Azerenerji电网规格设定；（4）符合适用AZS或IEC标准的电能质量和谐波限值；（5）送电前须取得Azerenerji或Azerishig的项目专属并网批准。大型项目（如Masdar Garadagh 230 MW、ACWA Power项目）无论当地最低要求是否要求，均须遵循IEC标准和贷款方（欧洲复兴开发银行、国际金融公司）规格。重要提示：独联体标称220/380 V 50 Hz电网意味着与中国出厂固件相比重新参数化风险较低，但阿塞拜疆电网运营商批准和项目专属保护设置仍为强制要求——中国国内并网审批不能转移。
summary.zht: 亞塞拜疆電網以50 Hz運行，獨聯體傳統標稱電壓為單相220 V、三相380 V——與中國依據GB/T 156的國內電網標稱值相同。Azerenerji為國有發電和輸電公司；Azerishig（Azerenerji子公司/配電部門）運營配電和零售網路。併網光伏逆變器須符合亞塞拜疆併網技術要求，包括：（1）IEC 62116防孤島測試合規——逆變器須在規定時間內偵測電網失電並斷開；（2）IEC 61727（光伏系統——公用電力介面特性）對電網介面特性的規定；（3）頻率和電壓保護閾值須按Azerishig/Azerenerji電網規格設定；（4）符合適用AZS或IEC標準的電能品質和諧波限值；（5）送電前須取得Azerenerji或Azerishig的項目專屬併網批准。大型項目（如Masdar Garadagh 230 MW、ACWA Power項目）無論當地最低要求是否要求，均須遵循IEC標準和貸款方（歐洲復興開發銀行、國際金融公司）規格。重要提示：獨聯體標稱220/380 V 50 Hz電網意味著與中國出廠韌體相比重新參數化風險較低，但亞塞拜疆電網運營商批准和項目專屬保護設定仍為強制要求——中國國內併網審批不能轉移。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic (PV) systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions
AZS national standards (GOST/IEC-derived) adopted by AZSTAND for grid-connected PV equipment
Azerenerji / Azerishig grid-connection technical specifications and project-specific connection conditions

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System, applicable to utility-scale PV connected via 10 kV and above), NB/T 32004-2018 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), and domestic anti-islanding and protection test results. Because Azerbaijan's nominal grid voltage (220/380 V at 50 Hz) matches China's GB/T 156 nominal values, the firmware protection parameter overlap is greater than for markets with different voltage levels. However, Chinese grid-connection documents are not accepted as Azerbaijan Azerenerji or Azerishig grid-connection evidence. Project-specific technical conditions, protection relay coordination, and commissioning documentation must be obtained through the Azerbaijani grid-operator approval process.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定，适用于通过10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏电站）、NB/T 32004-2018（光伏并网逆变器技术规范）及国内防孤岛和保护测试结果。由于阿塞拜疆标称电网电压（50 Hz 220/380 V）与中国GB/T 156标称值一致，固件保护参数重叠程度高于电压等级不同的市场。但中国并网文件不被接受为阿塞拜疆Azerenerji或Azerishig的并网证据。项目专属技术条件、保护继电器配合和调试文件须通过阿塞拜疆电网运营商审批程序取得。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定，適用於通過10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏電站）、NB/T 32004-2018（光伏並網逆變器技術規範）及國內防孤島和保護測試結果。由於亞塞拜疆標稱電網電壓（50 Hz 220/380 V）與中國GB/T 156標稱值一致，韌體保護參數重疊程度高於電壓等級不同的市場。但中國併網文件不被接受為亞塞拜疆Azerenerji或Azerishig的併網證據。項目專屬技術條件、保護繼電器配合和調試文件須通過亞塞拜疆電網運營商審批程序取得。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
GB/T 156 — 标准电压 (Standard voltages) — 220/380 V at 50 Hz
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: While Azerbaijan's 220/380 V at 50 Hz nominal grid voltage matches China's, Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not satisfy Azerbaijan Azerenerji / Azerishig grid-connection requirements. Exporters and project developers must: (a) obtain IEC 62116 anti-islanding test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; (b) verify inverter compliance with IEC 61727 grid interface characteristics; (c) prepare power quality and harmonic emission evidence per applicable AZS or IEC standards; (d) obtain project-specific grid-connection technical conditions and protection relay coordination approval from Azerenerji or Azerishig; (e) for large-scale projects with EBRD or IFC financing, prepare IEC-based compliance documentation package as required by the lender's environmental and social standards and equipment specifications. Confirm the current edition of Azerenerji and Azerishig grid-connection technical specifications directly with the relevant grid operator before finalising the equipment package.
gap.zh: 差距：尽管阿塞拜疆标称电网电压220/380 V 50 Hz与中国一致，中国GB/T并网文件不满足阿塞拜疆Azerenerji/Azerishig并网要求。出口商和项目开发商须：（a）从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62116防孤岛测试报告；（b）核实逆变器符合IEC 61727电网接口特性；（c）依据适用AZS或IEC标准准备电能质量和谐波排放证据；（d）从Azerenerji或Azerishig取得项目专属并网技术条件和保护继电器配合批准；（e）对于有欧洲复兴开发银行或国际金融公司融资的大型项目，须按贷款方环境和社会标准及设备规格要求准备基于IEC的合规文件包。在最终确定设备包前，请直接向相关电网运营商核实Azerenerji和Azerishig并网技术规格的现行版本。
gap.zht: 差距：儘管亞塞拜疆標稱電網電壓220/380 V 50 Hz與中國一致，中國GB/T併網文件不滿足亞塞拜疆Azerenerji/Azerishig併網要求。出口商和項目開發商須：（a）從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62116防孤島測試報告；（b）核實逆變器符合IEC 61727電網介面特性；（c）依據適用AZS或IEC標準準備電能品質和諧波排放證據；（d）從Azerenerji或Azerishig取得項目專屬併網技術條件和保護繼電器配合批准；（e）對於有歐洲復興開發銀行或國際金融公司融資的大型項目，須按貸款方環境和社會標準及設備規格要求準備基於IEC的合規文件包。在最終確定設備包前，請直接向相關電網運營商核實Azerenerji和Azerishig併網技術規格的現行版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid connection under Azerenerji / Azerishig technical specifications; project-specific grid-connection approval from the grid operator is a non-negotiable gate before energisation
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China's grid operator requirements but does not transfer to Azerbaijan Azerenerji or Azerishig grid-connection acceptance

source.publisher: Azerenerji (Joint Stock Company, Azerbaijan State Electricity Grid)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Azerbaijan's CIS-legacy 220/380 V at 50 Hz grid reduces firmware re-parameterisation risk compared to markets with different voltage levels, but Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents are not accepted as Azerenerji or Azerishig grid-connection evidence. Obtain IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 compliance evidence and secure project-specific grid-connection technical conditions from the relevant Azerbaijani grid operator before energisation. For EBRD- or IFC-financed projects, confirm the lender's specific equipment specification requirements directly with the project's environmental and social consultant.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿塞拜疆独联体传统220/380 V 50 Hz电网相比电压等级不同的市场降低了固件重新参数化风险，但中国GB/T并网文件不被接受为Azerenerji或Azerishig并网证据。请取得IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727合规证据，并在送电前从相关阿塞拜疆电网运营商取得项目专属并网技术条件。对于欧洲复兴开发银行或国际金融公司融资项目，请直接向项目环境和社会顾问确认贷款方具体设备规格要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 亞塞拜疆獨聯體傳統220/380 V 50 Hz電網相比電壓等級不同的市場降低了韌體重新參數化風險，但中國GB/T併網文件不被接受為Azerenerji或Azerishig併網證據。請取得IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727合規證據，並在送電前從相關亞塞拜疆電網運營商取得項目專屬併網技術條件。對於歐洲復興開發銀行或國際金融公司融資項目，請直接向項目環境和社會顧問確認貸款方具體設備規格要求。

requirement_topic.en: Large-Scale Solar Projects — Lender (EBRD / IFC) and Project-Owner Equipment Specifications
requirement_topic.zh: 大型太阳能项目——贷款方（欧洲复兴开发银行/国际金融公司）及项目业主设备规格
requirement_topic.zht: 大型太陽能項目——貸款方（歐洲復興開發銀行/國際金融公司）及項目業主設備規格

summary.en: Azerbaijan has attracted significant utility-scale solar investment, with landmark projects including the Masdar Garadagh Solar Park (230 MW, commissioned 2023) and ACWA Power projects. These large-scale projects are typically financed by international lenders such as the European Bank for Reconstruction and Development (EBRD) and the International Finance Corporation (IFC), or structured as government-guaranteed IPP contracts. Lender and project-owner equipment specifications for such projects require IEC-based compliance documentation regardless of whether local AZSTAND minimum requirements would be sufficient. Typical lender requirements include: (a) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test certificates from an IECEE CB-scheme body or equivalent ILAC-accredited laboratory; (b) IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence; (c) grid fault ride-through (FRT) capability per IEC or project-specific specification; (d) IEC 61000-series power-quality compliance; (e) performance guarantees and data-sheet compliance per IEC or EN standards. Chinese inverters supplied to such projects must meet the project's equipment specification, not only the minimum Azerbaijan domestic standard.
summary.zh: 阿塞拜疆吸引了大量公用事业规模太阳能投资，标志性项目包括Masdar Garadagh太阳能园区（230 MW，2023年投产）和ACWA Power项目。这些大型项目通常由国际贷款方（如欧洲复兴开发银行和国际金融公司）融资，或以政府担保的独立发电商合同形式构建。此类项目的贷款方和项目业主设备规格无论AZSTAND当地最低要求是否充分，均要求基于IEC的合规文件。典型贷款方要求包括：（a）来自IECEE CB认证机构或同等ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证书；（b）IEC 62116防孤岛证据；（c）符合IEC或项目专属规格的电网故障穿越（FRT）能力；（d）IEC 61000系列电能质量合规；（e）符合IEC或EN标准的性能保证和数据表。供应至此类项目的中国逆变器须符合项目设备规格，不能仅满足阿塞拜疆国内最低标准。
summary.zht: 亞塞拜疆吸引了大量公用事業規模太陽能投資，標誌性項目包括Masdar Garadagh太陽能園區（230 MW，2023年投產）和ACWA Power項目。這些大型項目通常由國際貸款方（如歐洲復興開發銀行和國際金融公司）融資，或以政府擔保的獨立發電商合同形式構建。此類項目的貸款方和項目業主設備規格無論AZSTAND當地最低要求是否充分，均要求基於IEC的合規文件。典型貸款方要求包括：（a）來自IECEE CB認證機構或同等ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證書；（b）IEC 62116防孤島證據；（c）符合IEC或項目專屬規格的電網故障穿越（FRT）能力；（d）IEC 61000系列電能品質合規；（e）符合IEC或EN標準的性能保證和數據表。供應至此類項目的中國逆變器須符合項目設備規格，不能僅滿足亞塞拜疆國內最低標準。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61000-series — Electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
EBRD and IFC environmental and social standards — equipment technical specifications for financed renewable energy projects
Project-specific equipment specification (EPC contract or owner's engineer specification)

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter export documentation commonly includes GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004-2018, manufacturer's test reports, and in many cases IEC 62109 CB scheme certificates obtained specifically for international export markets. For Chinese inverters already holding IECEE CB scheme certificates under IEC 62109-1/-2, these certificates are a strong starting point for demonstrating lender-required safety compliance. However, additional project-specific evidence (FRT, grid settings validation, performance data, O&M documentation) will be required by the project owner or lender's technical adviser regardless of the CB certificate status.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器出口文件通常包括GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004-2018、制造商测试报告，以及许多情况下专门为国际出口市场取得的IEC 62109 CB认证证书。对于已持有IEC 62109-1/-2 IECEE CB认证证书的中国逆变器，这些证书是证明贷款方所要求的安全合规的有力起点。但项目业主或贷款方技术顾问无论CB证书状态如何，还将要求额外的项目专属证据（故障穿越、电网设置验证、性能数据、运维文件）。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器出口文件通常包括GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004-2018、製造商測試報告，以及許多情況下專門為國際出口市場取得的IEC 62109 CB認證證書。對於已持有IEC 62109-1/-2 IECEE CB認證證書的中國逆變器，這些證書是證明貸款方所要求的安全合規的有力起點。但項目業主或貸款方技術顧問無論CB證書狀態如何，還將要求額外的項目專屬證據（故障穿越、電網設定驗證、性能數據、運維文件）。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
IECEE CB Scheme certificates under IEC 62109-1/-2 (where the Chinese manufacturer has obtained these for export)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese domestic GB/T certifications alone are insufficient for lender-financed large-scale solar projects in Azerbaijan. Exporters and project developers must confirm the project owner's or lender's technical adviser's specific equipment specification requirements before committing to a compliance package. Key actions: (a) obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 IECEE CB scheme or equivalent ILAC-accredited certificates if not already held; (b) prepare grid FRT evidence per IEC or project specification; (c) validate firmware settings for Azerbaijan 50 Hz / 220/380 V grid and document the configuration; (d) prepare IEC 61000-series power quality compliance evidence; (e) confirm with the project's owner's engineer or lender adviser which specific IEC standard editions and test conditions are required. Do not assume that meeting AZSTAND minimum domestic requirements satisfies lender specifications for EBRD- or IFC-financed projects.
gap.zh: 差距：中国国内GB/T认证单独不足以满足阿塞拜疆贷款方融资大型太阳能项目的要求。出口商和项目开发商须在确定合规包前确认项目业主或贷款方技术顾问的具体设备规格要求。关键行动：（a）如尚未持有IEC 62109-1/-2 IECEE CB认证或同等ILAC认可证书，须予取得；（b）依据IEC或项目规格准备电网故障穿越证据；（c）验证阿塞拜疆50 Hz / 220/380 V电网的固件设置并记录配置；（d）准备IEC 61000系列电能质量合规证据；（e）向项目业主工程师或贷款方顾问确认所要求的具体IEC标准版本和测试条件。不要假设满足AZSTAND国内最低要求即可满足欧洲复兴开发银行或国际金融公司融资项目的贷款方规格。
gap.zht: 差距：中國國內GB/T認證單獨不足以滿足亞塞拜疆貸款方融資大型太陽能項目的要求。出口商和項目開發商須在確定合規包前確認項目業主或貸款方技術顧問的具體設備規格要求。關鍵行動：（a）如尚未持有IEC 62109-1/-2 IECEE CB認證或同等ILAC認可證書，須予取得；（b）依據IEC或項目規格準備電網故障穿越證據；（c）驗證亞塞拜疆50 Hz / 220/380 V電網的韌體設定並記錄配置；（d）準備IEC 61000系列電能品質合規證據；（e）向項目業主工程師或貸款方顧問確認所要求的具體IEC標準版本和測試條件。不要假設滿足AZSTAND國內最低要求即可滿足歐洲復興開發銀行或國際金融公司融資項目的貸款方規格。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for EBRD- and IFC-financed large-scale solar projects in Azerbaijan, regardless of local AZSTAND minimum requirements; project-owner specification is the operative compliance gate
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese GB/T certifications satisfy China domestic requirements but are not substitutes for IEC-based lender specifications required for international project finance

source.publisher: European Bank for Reconstruction and Development (EBRD)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For EBRD- or IFC-financed solar projects in Azerbaijan, IEC-based compliance documentation is effectively mandatory regardless of local AZSTAND minimum requirements. Confirm the project-specific equipment specification with the lender's technical adviser or owner's engineer before committing to a compliance test programme. Do not rely on AZSTAND domestic conformity alone as a substitute for lender specification compliance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于阿塞拜疆欧洲复兴开发银行或国际金融公司融资太阳能项目，无论AZSTAND当地最低要求如何，基于IEC的合规文件实际上是强制性的。在启动合规测试计划前，请向贷款方技术顾问或业主工程师确认项目专属设备规格。不要单独依赖AZSTAND国内符合性替代贷款方规格合规。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於亞塞拜疆歐洲復興開發銀行或國際金融公司融資太陽能項目，無論AZSTAND當地最低要求如何，基於IEC的合規文件實際上是強制性的。在啟動合規測試計畫前，請向貸款方技術顧問或業主工程師確認項目專屬設備規格。不要單獨依賴AZSTAND國內符合性替代貸款方規格合規。
